title: Shadownet A2A Message Envelope
description: Schema for the `data` of a part with type `shadownet/v1+envelope`. See RFC-0006.

interaction.description: OPTIONAL. URI naming an Interaction Profile when payload follows a typed schema. Absent for free-form (text-default) envelopes. Verifiers MUST NOT reject envelopes solely because `interaction` is absent or unknown.

payload.description: When `interaction` is absent, payload SHOULD include a `text` field with the natural-language message; senders MAY attach structured `hints`. When `interaction` is present, payload follows the schema set by that Interaction Profile.
